Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IVirtualDeviceService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IVirtualDeviceService
  • public class IVirtualDeviceService
extends IDeviceService
    The VirtualDeviceService

    This class is the VirtualDeviceService, providing access to capabilities that
    can be interacted with on an virtual audio device. A virtual audio device is
    an abstract audio device running within Aspen which can control audio features
    implemented in an audio system running on the same device.

      called.

      • fillToneGeneratorAudioStreamBuffer

        public void fillToneGeneratorAudioStreamBuffer​(IntVector buffer)
        Fills an audio stream buffer used with tone generator

        When a virtual device service is used and a hearing test is started, the
        VirtualDeviceService function,
        IVirtualDeviceServiceCallbacks::start_tone_generator_audio_stream is
        called. The Aspen client shall then create an audio stream and call
        fill_tone_generator_audio_stream_buffer when new samples are to be written
        to the audio player.

        Parameters:
        buffer - The audio buffer to fill
